Record Class TransactionResponse

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.dto.TransactionResponse
Record Components:
transactionId - the unique transaction identifier
sourceAccountId - the debited account identifier
destinationAccountId - the credited account identifier
amount - the transferred amount
currency - the ISO 4217 currency code
status - the transaction outcome (e.g., "COMPLETED")
failureReason - the failure description, or null on success
createdAt - the ISO-8601 transaction creation timestamp
public record TransactionResponse(UUID transactionId, UUID sourceAccountId, UUID destinationAccountId, BigDecimal amount, String currency, String status, String failureReason, Instant createdAt) extends Record
Response DTO representing the result of a fund transfer returned by the REST API.
Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Constructor Details

    • TransactionResponse

      public TransactionResponse(UUID transactionId, UUID sourceAccountId, UUID destinationAccountId, BigDecimal amount, String currency, String status, String failureReason, Instant createdAt)
      Creates an instance of a TransactionResponse record class.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - the value for the transactionId record component
      sourceAccountId - the value for the sourceAccountId record component
      destinationAccountId - the value for the destinationAccountId record component
      amount - the value for the amount record component
      currency - the value for the currency record component
      status - the value for the status record component
      failureReason - the value for the failureReason record component
      createdAt - the value for the createdAt record component

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static TransactionResponse from(Transaction tx)
      Factory method that maps a domain Transaction to a TransactionResponse.
      Parameters:
      tx - the domain transaction to convert
      Returns:
      the corresponding response DTO

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
